ads.headline: Lead gen intent dropping; pivot messaging to immediate service urgency
actions: Test 'same-day service' and 'emergency booking' ad copy variants today
Add countdown timers to ad creative for limited-time service slots
Create urgency-based audience segments for high-intent searchers in local areas
ads.source: Google Trends lead generation interest decline (17) vs meta ads baseline (27)

creative.headline: Unable to provide reliable recommendations — data source incomplete
actions: STOP: The Google Trends data shows all zeros (0-100), and there's no actual engagement data provided
I need: real post metrics (views, likes, shares, DM rates from actual @marcomarkets posts), audience demographics, and what content actually resonated this week
Without real performance data, any recommendation would be guessing and could waste your time filming content that won't convert
creative.source: Incomplete data provided — cannot ethically recommend strategy without: (1) actual post performance metrics, (2) DM/conversion rates by content type, (3) what specific hooks got his audience to message 'ADS', (4) competitor/trending angles in the local service ads space

critic.headline: Meta's algorithm starving your ads of budget mid-campaign
actions: Check your Ads Manager for campaigns that suddenly dropped spend 24-48 hours in
Look at 'Learning Limited' or 'Learning' status badges on active campaigns this week
Compare your actual spend vs. daily budget × number of days running; shortfall = money left on the table
critic.source: Meta ads community reports, week of [current week]

competitors.headline: No one is teaching service businesses HOW to respond to leads from ads
actions: Uncovered angle: competitors teach how to get leads but never what to say when the lead comes in — film 'exact script I tell my clients to use when someone fills in the form'
Pain point from this week: 'I got leads from my ads but none of them booked' — hook: 'You got leads but nobody booked. Here is exactly why and how to fix it in one message'
Top accounts posting 3-4x per week minimum with one Reel hitting 10k+ views acting as top of funnel — post volume is the differentiator right now
